entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_0290_0001_0020_cha200
content: I'll need to make do now.
Vou ter que dar um jeito.

entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_0540_0001_0030_cha200
content: あなた　タイプじゃないの

entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_0550_0001_0010_cha200
content: Você é osso duro de roer.

entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_0630_0001_0020_cha300
content: أنت على علم بما يلزم فعله!

entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_0720_0001_0010_cha300
content: おい　俺が何かやったか？
Hé ! Qu'est-ce que je t'ai fait ?
Hey, was hab ich dir getan?
Ô, o que foi que eu fiz?

entries.name: AO_Mes_Main_Speech_1780_0001_0050_cha200
content: この声？　どういうこと？
